prefixDef.p: Analytical descriptors are considered to represent concepts from the DEPCHA bookkeeping ontology and can be extended to respective URIs.
Analytical descriptors are considered to represent concepts from the project-specific DEPCHA ontology and can be extended to respective URIs.
Analytical descriptors are considered to represent concepts from the historical units and currencies ontology and can be extended to respective URIs.

div.head: Conduccio mechanicorum Anno etc. Lxxxxi
div.ab:
Tytulus pellificis
Computavimus cum Wilhelmo pellifici de omnibus laboribus nobis factis / et promeruit a nobis
vi lb. v s. vi d. in diversis laboribus suis In hoc defalcavimus sibi / de concessis / In avena / tritico / Siligine
Sale / et feno ex antiquis / iiii lb. vi s. iiij̸ d. / Et sic ten tenemur sibi xv s. iij̸ d.
In hoc dedit in antiquis debitis i lb. d. / dedimus sibi vii s. iij̸ d. et sic solutus est
totaliter feria 2a ante Steffani Invencionis / In presencia granarii et Jacobi hospitis. Anno etc. Lxxxxi
Idem tenetur nobis adhuc in antiquiis ii lb. vii s. d.
